full_text:
Zhou Ping 周平
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhou Ping (周平). Went to aid Xia Xun but was disconcerted by his death and slain by Guan Xing. Zhou Ping is a fictional character. Zhou Ping was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Zhou Ping lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
